title: Badges, quests, XP toast, and tutorial quests
summary: 33a progress ledger와 33b MYPAGE compact progress UI를 기반으로 badge, quest, tutorial quest, XP notification 경험을 설계하고 구현한다. 경쟁형 랭킹/압박형 streak 없이 집밥 루틴을 쌓는 성장 UX로 제한한다.
goal: 사용자가 저장, 장보기, 요리 완료 같은 실제 집밥 행동이 배지와 퀘스트로 쌓이는 것을 보고 다음 행동을 자연스럽게 이해하게 한다.

required_checks: pnpm exec -- vitest run tests/user-gamification-definitions.test.ts tests/user-gamification-events.test.ts tests/user-gamification-route.test.ts tests/user-gamification-source-action-smoke.test.ts

pnpm exec -- vitest run tests/user-progress-events.test.ts tests/user-progress-route.test.ts tests/recipe-save-route.test.ts tests/recipe-books-route.test.ts tests/shopping-complete.backend.test.ts tests/cook-planner-complete.backend.test.ts tests/cook-standalone-complete.backend.test.ts tests/user-gamification-definitions.test.ts tests/user-gamification-events.test.ts tests/user-gamification-route.test.ts tests/user-gamification-source-action-smoke.test.ts
pnpm exec -- vitest run tests/mypage.backend.test.ts tests/settings-account.backend.test.ts tests/user-progress-route.test.ts tests/user-gamification-route.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm exec -- vitest run tests/user-gamification-definitions.test.ts tests/user-gamification-events.test.ts tests/user-gamification-route.test.ts tests/user-gamification-source-action-smoke.test.ts
pnpm exec -- vitest run tests/mypage.backend.test.ts tests/settings-account.backend.test.ts tests/user-progress-route.test.ts tests/user-gamification-route.test.ts

notes: Stage 1 docs PR #723 and contract-evolution PR #724 are merged. Stage 2 backend implementation is in progress on feature/be-33c-badges-quests-toasts-tutorial with gamification tables, read/seen/dismiss routes, server badge/quest definitions, projection after 33a events, and targeted Vitest/typecheck evidence. closeout_phase=collecting
